description: So, it’s our award-winning breast-like nipple that you and baby love, but now you can combine it with our most breast-like bottle. When you are looking for a bottle that is the next best thing to you, this is the one! Made from soft-feel silicone that allows the warmth of the milk to be felt by baby and the softness that feels like a breast so your baby will be comforted when you are not an option. Loved by moms and babies, our easy latch-on, breast-like nipple feels closer to skin and mimics the natural flex and movement of a mom's breast for a comfortable feeding. 95% of moms reported that their baby accepted the super soft silicone nipple with skin-like feel and would recommend to others. All Closer to Nature bottle nipples feature an anti-colic valve to prevent the symptoms of colic by ensuring your little one ingests more milk and less air. Together with the bottle’s sensitive valve, the wide bottle neck encourages your baby’s intuitive feeding action. Designed to be held in the most natural position during feeding, the compact shape of the bottle also allows baby to be closer to you. The anti-static silicone coating keeps the bottle clean and hygienic by repelling dust particles and won’t retain any stains and odors left behind by breast milk or formula. The wide neck bottle makes cleaning easy, and the bottles are suitable for use in the dishwasher, microwave, sterilizer and bottle warmer. Easy to assemble and guaranteed no leaks when feeding your baby with an included lid and travel disc to prevent spills or leaks when on the go. 100% BPA, PVC and Phthalate free for your ultimate reassurance. Our Soft Feel Silicone Bottles are only compatible with our range of Closer to Nature nipples - available in a range of flow rates to keep up with your growing baby. We recommend changing your bottle nipples every two months or if they get damaged, weak or bitten by tiny teeth.

description: Philips Avent Natural glass bottles for babies support the well-being of your baby so you can take the best care of yourself. The Natural Response nipple with the unique opening and tip lets your baby control the pace of the milk flow, releasing milk only when actively drinking - just like babies do during breastfeeding. When pausing to swallow and breathe, no milk flows. Feeding feels as natural as from the breast! Easily combine breast and bottle feeding with a wide, soft and flexible nipple that mimics the shape and feel of a breast. It helps the baby to latch on and feed comfortably, using its natural rhythm. With the no-drip design, the nipple helps prevent spills and lost milk. An anti-colic valve integrated into the nipple is designed to reduce colic and discomfort by sending air away from your baby's tummy. The ergonomic shape makes it comfortable for parents to hold and easy for small fingers to grasp. Assembly is simple, with only a few parts, while the wide bottleneck makes filling and cleaning easy. Philips Avent Natural glass baby bottles are made of premium quality borosilicate glass, a BPA-free material. They're heat and thermal shock resistant, so they can be safely stored in the fridge, warmed and are easy to wash and sterilize. Use the Philips Avent Natural glass baby bottles with Philips Avent Natural Response bottle nipples. It is totally natural for your baby to take 2-3 tries to get milk flowing from a new bottle. We have 5 different nipple flow rates for the Natural bottle. When looking for the right one, age is a guide, but your baby's approach to drinking and the feeding cues will help determine when to move to a higher or lower nipple flow rate. Suckling is a skill and some babies develop it quicker than others. That’s why some babies might initially benefit from our “First Flow” nipple (Nipple 0) before progressing to the Natural Response nipples. Switch to “First Flow” nipple when your baby takes longer than 20 minutes to drink 50 ml/1.7 oz using the Natural Response nipples. If feeding difficulties persist, consult a healthcare professional. ¹ IQVIA Health ProVoice Survey 2025, USA

description: With our Advanced Anti-Colic baby bottle, switching between breast and bottle feeding has never been simpler. With our breast-like nipple and unique anti-colic technology, it could just be the best thing for baby, since you! Inspired by mom, designed by experts. This is no ordinary bottle. Tommee Tippee Advanced Anti-Colic bottles work a little differently from regular bottles to help combat colic while ensuring a comfortable feeding experience for you and your baby. The unique 3-piece anti-colic venting system draws air away from milk and the star valve keeps milk from traveling up the tube, meaning less gas, reflux and discomfort – 84% of moms who used our Anti-Colic bottles agreed they reduced their baby’s colic symptoms.* Plus, the anti-colic venting tube comes with a built-in heat sensing strip that gives you extra reassurance that the milk is a safe temperature for baby. Which flow rate do I need? We offer different flow rates to keep up with your growing baby. Every baby is different but as a guide we suggest slow flow for 0+ months, medium flow for 3+ months and fast flow for 6+ months. Advanced Anti-Colic nipples are only compatible with Advanced Anti-Colic bottles. How often should I replace the bottle nipples? We recommend changing your bottle nipples every two months. And you should change them immediately if they're damaged or weak. * Based on 2021 study of 524 parents who use Tommee Tippee bottles.
